user.title: TeamSpeak Server
user.description: How should the integration talk to your TeamSpeak server?

menu_options.webquery: WebQuery HTTP API with API key (recommended)

webquery.title: TeamSpeak WebQuery
webquery.description: WebQuery must be enabled on the server (query_protocols=raw,http). Create an API key with the ServerQuery command: apikeyadd scope=read lifetime=0

serverquery.title: TeamSpeak ServerQuery
serverquery.description: Connect to the raw ServerQuery interface of your TeamSpeak server.

error.invalid_sid: This virtual server ID does not exist on the server
